name: Discourse
description: Interact with Discourse. This official Discourse MCP integration is installable through Cline.

env.name: DISCOURSE_API_KEY
env.description: Discourse API key for writes or private content access.

install.notes: Transport from source catalog: stdio; optional HTTP. Auth from source catalog: None by default; Discourse API keys for writes/private access. Official Discourse GitHub repo; supports selecting/tethering to a Discourse site.
